---
title: ""
pagetitle: "DigiPols — Digital Politics & Political Communication Research Lab"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="digipols-hero">
  <!-- Signal background: concentric beacon rings + a faint sampled waveform -->
  <svg class="hero-bg" viewBox="0 0 1440 720" preserveAspectRatio="xMaxYMid slice" aria-hidden="true">
    <defs>
      <radialGradient id="beaconFade" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2E6FE0" stop-opacity="0.22"/>
        <stop offset="60%" stop-color="#2E6FE0" stop-opacity="0.06"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2E6FE0" stop-opacity="0"/>
      </radialGradient>
    </defs>
    <!-- emanating rings, anchored right -->
    <g transform="translate(1180 360)" fill="none" stroke="#0E1014">
      <circle r="80"  stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.7"/>
      <circle r="140" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.45"/>
      <circle r="210" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.28"/>
      <circle r="290" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.17"/>
      <circle r="380" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.10"/>
      <circle r="480" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.06"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="1180" cy="360" r="280" fill="url(#beaconFade)"/>
    <circle cx="1180" cy="360" r="14"  fill="#2E6FE0"/>
    <!-- discrete signal at the very bottom -->
    <g transform="translate(0 690)" fill="#0E1014" opacity="0.55">
      <!-- bars generated with a sin-mix; widths/heights chosen for rhythm -->
      <rect x="0"    width="3" height="6"/>  <rect x="14"  width="3" height="12"/>
      <rect x="28"   width="3" height="22"/> <rect x="42"  width="3" height="9"/>
      <rect x="56"   width="3" height="5"/>  <rect x="70"  width="3" height="16"/>
      <rect x="84"   width="3" height="26"/> <rect x="98"  width="3" height="18"/>
      <rect x="112"  width="3" height="8"/>  <rect x="126" width="3" height="6"/>
      <rect x="140"  width="3" height="14"/> <rect x="154" width="3" height="22"/>
      <rect x="168"  width="3" height="11"/> <rect x="182" width="3" height="7"/>
      <rect x="196"  width="3" height="4"/>  <rect x="210" width="3" height="10"/>
      <rect x="224"  width="3" height="19"/> <rect x="238" width="3" height="13"/>
      <rect x="252"  width="3" height="8"/>  <rect x="266" width="3" height="5"/>
      <rect x="280"  width="3" height="12"/> <rect x="294" width="3" height="21"/>
      <rect x="308"  width="3" height="14"/> <rect x="322" width="3" height="9"/>
      <rect x="336"  width="3" height="6"/>  <rect x="350" width="3" height="11"/>
      <rect x="364"  width="3" height="20"/> <rect x="378" width="3" height="15"/>
      <rect x="392"  width="3" height="10"/> <rect x="406" width="3" height="6"/>
      <rect x="420"  width="3" height="13"/> <rect x="434" width="3" height="22"/>
      <rect x="448"  width="3" height="16"/> <rect x="462" width="3" height="11"/>
      <rect x="476"  width="3" height="7"/>  <rect x="490" width="3" height="14"/>
      <rect x="504"  width="3" height="24"/> <rect x="518" width="3" height="17"/>
      <rect x="532"  width="3" height="12"/> <rect x="546" width="3" height="8"/>
      <rect x="560"  width="3" height="15"/> <rect x="574" width="3" height="23"/>
      <rect x="588"  width="3" height="18"/> <rect x="602" width="3" height="13"/>
    </g>
  </svg>

  <div class="hero-eyebrow">The Digital Politics &amp; Political Communication Research Lab</div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Studying how politics moves through <em>digital signal</em>.</h1>
  <p class="hero-lede">
    DigiPols is an inter-departmental research lab at the Cyprus University of Technology investigating the increasingly digitalised links between politicians, the media, civil society and citizens — through experimentation, Voting Advice Applications and bespoke data platforms.
  </p>
  <div style="margin-top:2rem; display:flex; gap:0.6rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <a href="research.html" class="btn btn-primary">Read the research →</a>
    <a href="team.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Meet the lab</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-meta">
    <span>fig 01 · communication flow, sampled</span>
    <span>4 clusters · est. 2018</span>
  </div>
</section>

<p class="section-eyebrow">↳ Research clusters</p>
<h2 style="margin:0 0 1rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:-0.025em;">Four clusters, one forum.</h2>

<div class="cluster-grid">
  <a class="cluster" href="research.html#applied-political-communication">
    <span class="cluster-code">cluster.01</span>
    <h3 class="cluster-title">Applied Political Communication</h3>
    <p class="cluster-blurb">Experimental work on how political information moves between political actors, media and citizens — including pioneering research on Voting Advice Applications.</p>
    <span class="cluster-cta">explore →</span>
  </a>
  <a class="cluster" href="research.html#media-and-social-media-monitoring">
    <span class="cluster-code">cluster.02</span>
    <h3 class="cluster-title">Media &amp; Social Media Monitoring</h3>
    <p class="cluster-blurb">Bespoke data-collection platforms that track political communication across news media and social media in real time, during election campaigns and beyond.</p>
    <span class="cluster-cta">explore →</span>
  </a>
  <a class="cluster" href="research.html#public-opinion-argument-mining">
    <span class="cluster-code">cluster.03</span>
    <h3 class="cluster-title">Public Opinion &amp; Argument Mining</h3>
    <p class="cluster-blurb">Techniques and tools for the analysis of public opinion, combining surveys with computational methods and argument mining from computational linguistics.</p>
    <span class="cluster-cta">explore →</span>
  </a>
  <a class="cluster" href="research.html#digipols-forum">
    <span class="cluster-code">cluster.04</span>
    <h3 class="cluster-title">The DigiPols Forum</h3>
    <p class="cluster-blurb">Umbrella organisation that convenes DigiPols researchers to exchange ideas, share state-of-the-art practice and set strategic direction for the lab.</p>
    <span class="cluster-cta">explore →</span>
  </a>
</div>

<p class="section-eyebrow" style="margin-top:3rem;">↳ Latest</p>
<h2 style="margin:0 0 1rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:-0.025em;">Recent highlights &amp; publications</h2>
```

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
**Highlights →**

Read the latest news, project launches and lab events.

[View highlights](highlights.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
**Publications →**

Peer-reviewed papers, reports and book chapters from the lab.

[View publications](publications.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::
